sections.paragraph:
Original: עזּה

Transliteration: ‛azzâh

Phonetic: az-zaw'

BDB Definition:

Azzah = "the strong"
  1. another name for 'Gaza', a city of the Philistines located in the extreme southwest of Palestine close to the Mediterranean

Origin: from H5794

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
